requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 as International Baseline for Zambia BESS Project Acceptance and ZABS Import Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619和IEC 62133作为赞比亚BESS项目验收和ZABS进口合格评定的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619和IEC 62133作為尚比亞BESS項目驗收和ZABS進口合格評定的國際基準

summary.en: Zambia does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or a dedicated national mandatory BESS certification scheme. ZABS (Zambia Bureau of Standards) operates an import conformity regime based on ZS standards, which adopt IEC international standards. ZABS import conformity certificates are required for regulated product categories imported into Zambia; whether stationary BESS cells and systems fall within the current ZABS import conformity scope should be verified directly with ZABS before shipment, as the regulated product list may be updated. However, IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and Zambia project owners, EPCs, ERB licensing conditions, and ZESCO and CEC connection agreements for utility-scale, mining, and C&I storage projects are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite. IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Cells and Batteries) may also be referenced in project specifications for smaller module-level assemblies. IEC 62933-5-2 is the system-level safety standard expected in project specifications. Exporters should verify the current ZABS import conformity regulated product scope directly with ZABS before shipment.
summary.zh: 赞比亚目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》相当或设有专用国家强制性BESS认证制度。ZABS（赞比亚标准局）基于ZS标准（采用IEC国际标准）运营进口合格评定制度。ZABS进口合格评定证书适用于进口赞比亚的受管控产品类别；固定式BESS电芯和系统是否属于现行ZABS进口合格评定范围，应在出货前直接向ZABS核实，因为受管控产品清单可能更新。然而，IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，赞比亚项目业主、EPC承包商、ERB许可条件及ZESCO和CEC公用事业规模、采矿和工商业储能项目的并网协议，预计将以IEC 62619合规作为技术前提。IEC 62133（便携式密封二次电芯和电池安全要求）也可能在项目规格中针对较小模组级组件被引用。IEC 62933-5-2是项目规格中预期的系统级安全标准。出口商在出货前应直接向ZABS核实现行ZABS进口合格评定受管控产品范围。
summary.zht: 尚比亞目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》相當或設有專用國家強制性BESS認證制度。ZABS（尚比亞標準局）基於ZS標準（採用IEC國際標準）運營進口合格評定制度。ZABS進口合格評定證書適用於進口尚比亞的受管控產品類別；固定式BESS電芯和系統是否屬於現行ZABS進口合格評定範圍，應在出貨前直接向ZABS核實，因為受管控產品清單可能更新。然而，IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，尚比亞項目業主、EPC承包商、ERB許可條件及ZESCO和CEC公用事業規模、採礦和工商業儲能項目的併網協議，預計將以IEC 62619合規作為技術前提。IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次電芯和電池安全要求）也可能在項目規格中針對較小模組級組件被引用。IEC 62933-5-2是項目規格中預期的系統級安全標準。出口商在出貨前應直接向ZABS核實現行ZABS進口合格評定受管控產品範圍。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Zambia project specifications and ERB licensing)
IEC 62133 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Cells and Batteries (may be referenced for smaller module-level assemblies in project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications and ZESCO/CEC connection agreements)
ZABS — Zambia Bureau of Standards (operates import conformity regime based on ZS/IEC standards; verify current regulated product scope for BESS cells and systems directly with ZABS before shipment)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Zambia project specifications, ZABS import conformity assessment, or ERB licensing. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 34120-2023 provide the grid-connection baseline but are not substitutes for IEC 62933 evidence in Zambia project or utility specifications.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619协调，不被赞比亚项目规格、ZABS进口合格评定或ERB许可接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证据。中国GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023提供并网基准，但在赞比亚项目或电力公司规格中不能替代IEC 62933证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619協調，不被尚比亞項目規格、ZABS進口合格評定或ERB許可接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證據。中國GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023提供併網基準，但在尚比亞項目或電力公司規格中不能替代IEC 62933證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Zambia project owners, ERB licensing, and ZESCO or CEC connection agreements reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications or ERB licensing. ZABS import conformity may also apply depending on current regulated product scope — verify directly with ZABS before shipment. Exporters should: (a) verify the current ZABS regulated product list for any mandatory import conformity certificate (ZS/IEC-based) obligation for BESS cells and systems; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Zambia BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition and whether IEC 62133 is also referenced for module-level assemblies in the project specification or ERB licensing condition; (d) obtain IEC 62933-5-2 system-level safety evidence where required by ZESCO, CEC, or project-owner specifications.
gap.zh: 关键差距：赞比亚项目业主、ERB许可及ZESCO或CEC并网协议将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格或ERB许可接受为替代依据。根据当前受管控产品范围，ZABS进口合格评定也可能适用——出货前直接向ZABS核实。出口商应：（a）核实现行ZABS受管控产品清单，确认BESS电芯和系统是否存在强制进口合格评定证书（基于ZS/IEC）义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至赞比亚BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）确认项目规格或ERB许可条件中引用的适用IEC 62619版本及模组级组件是否同样引用IEC 62133；（d）在ZESCO、CEC或项目业主规格有要求时，取得IEC 62933-5-2系统级安全证据。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：尚比亞項目業主、ERB許可及ZESCO或CEC併網協議將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格或ERB許可接受為替代依據。根據當前受管控產品範圍，ZABS進口合格評定也可能適用——出貨前直接向ZABS核實。出口商應：（a）核實現行ZABS受管控產品清單，確認BESS電芯和系統是否存在強制進口合格評定證書（基於ZS/IEC）義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至尚比亞BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）確認項目規格或ERB許可條件中引用的適用IEC 62619版本及模組級組件是否同樣引用IEC 62133；（d）在ZESCO、CEC或項目業主規格有要求時，取得IEC 62933-5-2系統級安全證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where ERB licensing, ZESCO, CEC, or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; ZABS mandatory import conformity obligation for BESS has not been confirmed — verify directly with ZABS
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Zambia as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Zambia project specifications, ERB licensing conditions, and ZESCO or CEC connection agreements. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Zambia project acceptance. Verify ZABS current import conformity regulated product scope and confirm IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence requirements with the project owner, ERB, ZESCO or CEC, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，赞比亚尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是赞比亚项目规格、ERB许可条件及ZESCO或CEC并网协议中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足赞比亚项目验收要求。出货前请核实ZABS现行进口合格评定受管控产品范围，并向项目业主、ERB、ZESCO或CEC及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，尚比亞尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是尚比亞項目規格、ERB許可條件及ZESCO或CEC併網協議中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足尚比亞項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實ZABS現行進口合格評定受管控產品範圍，並向項目業主、ERB、ZESCO或CEC及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2證據要求。
